sourcePolicy.source: GitHub repository catalog plus GitHub contents API
safety: Only Spring-relevant manifest/source excerpts are stored.
Comments are stripped and method bodies are not retained as executable source.
Saved files are JSON evidence documents, not buildable project files.
Prompt-injection-like text causes the repo fixture to be rejected.
sourcePolicy.adapterPolicy: Use this corpus to derive general Spring/JVM patterns only; do not add repo-specific rules.
